summary: Iteration 101: Backup & Restore Module - Full E2E testing complete. 26/26 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully tested and working. All features verified: GET /api/admin/backup/stats, /last, /export, POST /restore, Frontend Backup tab with data stats grid, export button with download, restore file upload.
critical_code_review_comments: Backup exports all 19 critical collections correctly (commesse, preventivi, clients, etc.)
Export JSON structure includes metadata (date, version, user_id), data (all collections), and stats
Restore correctly implements merge behavior - existing records with same PK are skipped, not overwritten
Primary key mapping in _get_pk_field() covers all collections that need deduplication
Backup log is properly saved to backup_log collection after each export
Frontend BackupTab correctly fetches /admin/backup/stats and /admin/backup/last on load
File download uses proper Content-Disposition header with filename pattern backup_normafacile_YYYYMMDD_HHMM.json
Frontend shows success toast notification after export completion
seed_data_creation: Test users and clients created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup & Restore feature fully implemented and tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration101_backup.py covers all 4 endpoints. Settings > Dati Azienda > Backup tab has export button, data stats grid, and restore file upload.

test_classes: TestBackupStats (4 tests) - returns 200, stats dict, total count, expected collections
TestLastBackup (3 tests) - returns 200, last_backup key, can be null initially
TestExportBackup (10 tests) - returns 200, JSON content type, content-disposition, filename format, metadata, data, stats, version 2.0, user_id match
TestRestoreBackup (4 tests) - invalid JSON returns 400, missing metadata returns 400, empty backup returns 200, returns result message
TestRestoreWithData (2 tests) - inserts new client, skips duplicate client (merge behavior)
TestBackupLog (1 test) - last backup updated after export

tests_executed.results: PASS - All UI elements and flows verified
verified: Settings page has 8 tabs: Azienda, Banca, Logo, Condizioni, Integrazioni, Certificazioni, Migrazione, Backup
Last backup info shows date, record count, and size
Data stats grid shows record counts per collection (14 collections displayed)
Export button 'Esegui Backup Ora' triggers file download
Success toast 'Backup scaricato con successo!' appears after download
Restore section with file upload area and merge warning text
data-testid attributes present: tab-backup, btn-export-backup, input-restore-file

features_verified: GET /api/admin/backup/stats - Returns stats dict with 19 collection counts and total
GET /api/admin/backup/last - Returns last_backup with date, filename, total_records, size_bytes
GET /api/admin/backup/export - Downloads JSON file with metadata, data, stats; saves to backup_log
POST /api/admin/backup/restore - Uploads JSON backup, merges data, returns inserted/skipped counts
Frontend Settings > Backup tab accessible from sidebar
Export button triggers file download with correct filename format
Data stats grid shows collection counts in visual cards
Restore section with file upload and merge safety notice
